cleavage agent: Proteolytic digestion was performed using trypsin/Lys-C mix
collision energy: fragmented with a normalized collision energy of 35%
enrichment method: Affinity chromatography was carried out on Heparin-HiTrap Sepharose
fractionation method: medium-pressure affinity chromatography on a Heparin-HiTrap Sepharose
instrument: All experiments were performed on an Orbitrap Fusion™ Lumos™
ionization type: The Orbitrap parameters in ESI+ were as follows
reduction reagent: Samples were reduced by addition of 3 mM TCEP
reduction concentration: Samples were reduced by addition of 3 mM TCEP
